name: FeePilot
desc:
FeePilot is a SaaS web application designed to simplify tuition fee collection for tutors and coaching centers. It enables educators to manage students, track payments, and send automated fee reminders to parents via WhatsApp, reducing the need for manual follow-ups and improving payment consistency.

The platform provides a centralized dashboard where tutors can add and manage student records, monitor payment statuses, and generate UPI-based payment links for seamless transactions. FeePilot also includes automated workflows for sending reminders and recording payment activity, along with an admin panel to oversee user activity, subscriptions, and system-wide data.

Built with a mobile-first, user-friendly interface, FeePilot focuses on simplicity, efficiency, and reliability, making it accessible for non-technical users while maintaining a scalable architecture for future enhancements.

name: StudyFreaks
desc: A premium education platform for students in Hailakandi, Assam. Features specialized prep modules for CBSE, ASSEB, and JNVST entrance exams with a focus on high-speed performance.

name: Enlight Coaching
desc: Quality education for Classes 6 to 10 with focus on conceptual clarity, disciplined learning, and academic excellence. Join Enlight Coaching Centre today.

name: Mariam Juice Cafe
desc:
Mariam Juice Cafe (MJC) – Website
Developed a modern, responsive website for Mariam Juice Cafe to showcase their menu and improve their online presence. The site features a dynamic menu connected to a Supabase database with an admin panel for easy updates. Built with a focus on speed, simplicity, and mobile-friendly design.
